I think it's a great place to go. I know you're going to be in the news cafe. You should absolutely see the news cafe. If any of you are interested, I want to talk to you about this. My apartment is about from here to the exit sign from my office. I get up, go over there, put the coffee on, go downstairs to the news cafe, which is open 24 hours a day. I get one or more papers. I go upstairs, drink my coffee, do 45 minutes of my treadmill as I stare outside at the beach. If you want to see where my office is, don't go up there. It is in Larios. My office is the top floor above Larios. I say don't go up there because there won't be anybody up there. If you want to see my office sometime, that's fine.
